reason: Enabling FIPS mode on an installed RHEL 9 system is not supported; changing crypto.fips_enabled can permanently lock out non-FIPS-compliant software and requires a reboot. Modifying boot parameters poses risk of losing console/SSH access if the system fails to boot.
estimated_impact: reboot required; potential lockout of non-FIPS applications; requires reboot; risk of unbootable system if boot parameter misconfigured
